name: controls
description: BPscript controls — layered by scope: engine [] / runtime () with transport sub-groups

_argType_doc._role: Comment la SURFACE lit la valeur d'un controle. Absent = lecture ordinaire : la valeur est tokenisee et la virgule SEPARE les arguments. Les valeurs ci-dessous font lire la valeur BRUTE, d'un seul tenant, et laissent l'aval la resoudre — c'est le meme principe dans les deux cas : la surface PORTE, elle n'interprete pas.
_argType_doc.interval: Intervalle musical, 3 formats acceptes : fraction 3/2, cents 700c, decimal 1.5. Porte brut, normalise en ratio par Kairos. Ex. transpose. Lecteur : readIntervalLiteral (parser.js).
_argType_doc.composite: Valeur en PLUSIEURS parties dont la virgule fait PARTIE INTEGRANTE, ex. keyxpand 'pivot,facteur' -> 'C4,2'. Sans ce marqueur la paire est scindee en deux arguments et le controle ne recoit que sa premiere moitie (l'aval crie alors 'needs a pivot note and a factor'). Lecteur : readCompositeLiteral (parser.js) — lit jusqu'a la parenthese fermante, virgules internes conservees ; BPx re-decoupe, lui seul connait la forme attendue. Ajoute 2026-07-18.
_argType_doc._ajouter_une_valeur: Mecanisme DATA-DRIVEN : declarer argType ici, peupler le Set correspondant dans libs.js (loadLibsFromDirectives) et exposer un universe<X>Controls(), puis brancher le lecteur dans parseSymbolCall. Aucune liste de controles codee en dur nulle part.

subgrammar._comment: @mode:X(modifier) syntax — emitted as BP3 preamble between mode line and rules

destru.description: Destructure composed terminals based on alphabet

randomize.description: Re-seed RNG from clock at production start (BP3 _randomize preamble, Encode.c case 50)

engine._comment: [] syntax — translated directly to BP3 instructions by the transpiler

repeat.description: Controlled repetition. expr = K-param or K-param=value.

goto.description: Jump to specific subgrammar and rule.

retro.description: Retrograde — reverse element order in polymetric context. Emitted as prefix inside the group.

shuffle.description: Shuffle — random reordering of sequence elements. Emitted as prefix inside the group. seed arg → _srand(N) prefix.

order.description: Order — restore canonical order of sequence elements. Emitted as prefix inside the group.

rotate.description: Rotate — cyclic rotation of sequence by N positions (engine, temporal). Emitted as prefix inside the group. Distinct from runtime (rotate) which is a pitch transformation.

staccato.description: Staccato — shorten note durations (affects temporal structure)

legato.description: Legato — extend note durations (affects temporal structure)

rndtime.description: Random timing jitter — displaces note attacks by ±N ms (temporal). Like staccato/legato, a current-parameter control, not a reorder.

randomize.description: Re-seed RNG from clock (BP3 _randomize, Encode.c case 50). No arguments.

runtime._comment: () syntax — annotation OPAQUE portée SUR l'événement jusqu'au runtime de sortie (audio/midi/osc). Dans l'AST : RuntimeQualifier{pairs:[{key,value}]} en suffixe, ou InstantControl dans le flux. Le `_script(CTn)` n'existe QUE dans le texte BP3 hérité (contrôle natif BP3, BP3_help.txt:495) — jamais dans le langage ni dans l'AST. Sub-groups define transport scope.

musical._comment: Transport-agnostic controls — every transport interprets them in its own protocol

vel.description: Velocity (0-127). WebAudio: gain, MIDI: NoteOn velocity

offvel.description: NoteOff velocity (0-127). Relevant for expressive controllers (Osmose, MPE)

midi._comment: MIDI-specific controls — only meaningful for MIDI transport

keymap.description: Key mapping — remap MIDI key range (p1,p2) to (q1,q2). Args are key numbers (0..127) or note names; p2 must be greater than p1. BP3 _keymap (registre moteur console_strings.json:212, code 62/4 args).

mapstep.description: Key-map interpolation mode: STEP (discrete). BP3 _mapstep (console_strings.json:215, code 1/0 args). Sibling of mapcont/mapfixed — selects how _keymap interpolates.

mapcont.description: Key-map interpolation mode: CONTINUOUS. BP3 _mapcont (console_strings.json:214, code 44/0 args). Sibling of mapstep/mapfixed.

mapfixed.description: Key-map interpolation mode: FIXED. BP3 _mapfixed (console_strings.json:213, code 64/0 args). Sibling of mapstep/mapcont.

script.description: MIDI script command (program change sequences, etc.)

cc.description: Generic MIDI CC: cc(number, value). For CCs without a named alias.

audio._comment: Audio (Web Audio) specific controls — groupe renommé webaudio→audio (canon 2026-07-16)

dispatcher._comment: Resolved by the dispatcher before reaching any transport — musical transformations

transpose.description: Real (chromatic) transposition — shift the alphabet anchor by a fixed interval (fraction 3/2, cents 700c, decimal 1.5). Preserves intervals AND note names; works in any tuning. A bare integer is a ratio N:1 (N-th harmonic): 2/4/8 = octaves; for semitones use cents (12 semitones = 1200c). The old grid-step regime is removed.

scale.description: Microtonal scale — name + base note. scale(0,0) = back to equal temperament.

scaleshift.description: Scalar (diatonic) transposition — shift N degrees in the alphabet. scaleshift(2): Sa->Ga, etc. Preserves degrees, not intervals (in unequal scales). Formerly rotate-HAUTEUR; distinct from the ![rotate] STRUCTURE control.

chromashift.description: Chromatic transposition on the 12-key grid — shift N chromatic keys (semitones), rename to target key + its tuning. Image of BP3 _transpose (Romain decision 2026-07-17). Distinct from scaleshift (diatonic degrees) and transpose (real, name preserved).

keyxpand.description: Interval expansion/contraction around a pivot. factor=2 doubles, factor=-1 inverts, factor=0.5 contracts.
keyxpand._argType_note: Valeur COMPOSITE 'pivot,facteur' lue BRUTE et portee en UNE SEULE chaine (ex. 'C4,2'). Sans ce marqueur la virgule est lue comme SEPARATEUR D'ARGUMENTS et la paire est scindee : keyxpand ne recevait que le pivot, et l'aval criait (BPx/dist/index.js:5945 'keyxpand needs a pivot note and a factor'). Meme mecanisme data-driven que argType:'interval' (transpose) : la surface porte brut, l'aval resout.

generic._comment: Sound object parameter controls — transport-agnostic, forwarded as-is

cont.description: Enable continuous mode for a parameter
